title: MeshSat Android — standalone field-gateway mobile app
youtrack_disambiguator: tag:android OR summary contains 'Compose'/'Android'/'Kotlin' — see ROUTING.md
build_host_required: nllei01androidsdk01 (192.168.181.101) — gradlew MUST NOT run locally

parallel_dev_exception.workflow: merge/<feature_id> short-lived branch + 1 MR per feature + auto-delete branch on merge
parallel_dev_exception.rationale: Repo's default 'push to main' rule conflicts with parallel-dev. Override only applies to parallel-dev waves.

test_infrastructure_gaps: NO androidTest/ directory — instrumented tests not in CI
Real-device validation requires emulator on nllei01androidsdk01 (shared resource)
_bounded_contexts_note: 1:1 mapping with actual Kotlin packages under com.cubeos.meshsat/. + app-entry for top-level MainActivity/MeshSatApp + build-config for Gradle/proguard + android-resources for res/.
